scripts.dev:all: concurrently "npm run dev -w backend-api" "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev -w admin-panel"
scripts.dev:all:with-workers: concurrently "npm run dev -w backend-api" "npm run dev -w frontend" "npm run dev -w admin-panel" "npm run dev -w workers"
scripts.infra:up: (docker compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d || docker-compose -f infra/docker-compose.yml up -d)
scripts.run:beast: npm run infra:up && npm run dev:all:with-workers
scripts.test:everything: npm run test -w backend-api && npm run test -w blockchain && npm run build -w workers && npm run build -w backend-api && npm run build -w frontend && npm run build -w admin-panel
